title: Pyrellium
body:
### The Nether has always been dangerous... but it's never been this alive.

![Pyrellium](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PYRELLIUM/MP_PYRELLIUM_Header.webp)

Pyrellium is a content-rich expansion mod that introduces 9 brand new biomes, seamlessly integrated with the vanilla Nether for a natural and immersive experience. Whether you're an explorer, builder, or survivalist, Pyrellium offers new challenges and rewards deep within the fiery realm.

![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PYRELLIUM/MP_PYRELLIUM_Description.webp)


### Flaming Forests
Discover blazing biomes, and obtain new spoils. But watch out, even the flora is out to harm you.

![Burning Grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uZWcuZ4t/images/f2000eca265d2d461713d7eaba1dca8bf396e4e4.png)

### Icy Depths
Find chilling places where frostbite meets fire. These treacherous frozen lands are as beautiful as they are deadly.

![Frostburn Valley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uZWcuZ4t/images/fb95609e36a0af2d253d14e9168aa612a4a758b8.png)

### Spider Sanctuaries
Venture into eerie caverns where intelligent spiders spin homes of silk and secrets. Tread carefully. You're not alone.

![Infested valley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a152fbe0de365b36b4a06a9bb99fffc9e5837f5e.png)

### Calming hopes
Not every biome is deadly, venture into the crystal forest to enjoy lands of beauty. and take a break from the danger.

![Crystal forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uZWcuZ4t/images/0061cbdd1063adf345d98fff54b9f6198e7b0ed8.png)

## And More!

Click the image below to be taken to [Bisect's website](https://bisecthosting.com/lankaster)
[![Bisect hosting partner link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PYRELLIUM/MP_PYRELLIUM_Promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/lankaster)

![Frequently Asked Questions](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PYRELLIUM/MP_PYRELLIUM_Faq.webp)

### Forge?
Pyrellium is fully compatible with [sinytra connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), use that for playing pyrellium on forge.

### Is this compatible with X mod?
Pyrellium was built with compatibility in mind. It works alongside all major Nether mods and fits naturally into both vanilla and modded environments.

### Will you be adding more biomes or features?
Pyrellium is currently in beta, this means more features are on the way. Adding more biomes itself will be unlikely, but stay tuned for new mobs, items, and other features.

### Hey this looks a lot like [Lankasters Nether](https://modrinth.com/datapack/lankasters-nether).
Yes. Pyrellium started as Lankasters Nether, but eventually grew to big to be just a datapack, and it was decided to switch over to making a mod. Lankasters Nether is still available as it's own project for archiving purposes, but it is recommended where possible to use Pyrellium instead.
